reapack.name: cueport_sync.lua
reapack.desc: CuePort Sync — Artist comments as markers

metadata.description: {\rtf1\ansi\deflang1033 {\fonttbl{\f0\fswiss\fcharset0 Helvetica;}} {\colortbl;\red230\green230\blue230;\red176\green136\blue224;\red150\green150\blue155;} \f0\fs22\cf1 \fs28\b\cf2 CuePort Sync\b0\fs22\cf1\par \par Reaper integration for \cf2 CuePort\cf1 . Pulls top-level artist comments for the active version of a production and places them as project markers with an on-hover tooltip showing the full text.\par \par \b Features\b0\par - Device-code pairing with the CuePort studio portal\par - Production picker grouped by artist with inline search\par - Project markers with uniform color + hidden ID encoding\par - Hover tooltip shows the full comment text\par - Floating pill + popup menu for one-click sync\par - Per-project binding stored in the .rpp\par \par \b Requirements\b0\par - Reaper 6.68 or later\par - \b ReaImGui\b0 (install via ReaPack, required)\par - \b curl\b0 (bundled with Win 10+/macOS/Linux)\par - \b SWS Extension\b0 (recommended, for reliable hover detection)\par - \b JS_ReaScriptAPI\b0 (recommended)\par \par \b Setup\b0\par 1. Install this package via ReaPack.\par 2. Open the Reaper Actions list and run \b cueport_sync.lua\b0 .\par 3. Click \b Connect to CuePort\b0 and approve in the browser.\par 4. Pick a production and bind it to the open .rpp.\par 5. Click \b Sync comments\b0 . Done.\par \par \b Time alignment\b0\par Comments are placed relative to the start of the rendered audio. Use the in-app Set-render-start button to align the ruler to your mix start.\par }

version.author: CuePort
version.changelog: v1.4.0 — Dockable main window: drag it into any Reaper docker or toggle it from Settings > Window; the docked position is remembered between sessions. New "Start in background" option (Settings > Startup) so auto-start launches without popping the main window open.

version.author: CuePort
version.changelog: v1.3.0 — A/B compare: load the active CuePort version into a hidden reference track and toggle playback between it and your DAW mix under one synced transport. The reference bypasses the project master and plays straight to hardware outputs 1/2. Temporary — removed on production switch, "Remove", or script exit.

version.author: CuePort
version.changelog: v1.2.1 — Clicking the waveform during playback draws a faint "pending" line at the target until the play cursor catches up (Reaper defers the seek to the next bar while playing), giving immediate visual feedback.

version.author: CuePort
version.changelog: v1.2.0 — Waveform now shows the live DAW play/edit cursor and is clickable: click or drag to move the DAW cursor (and seek playback) to that spot. Added Play/Pause + Stop transport buttons.

version.author: CuePort
version.changelog: v1.1.0 — Waveform block in the main window: the active version's peaks are drawn with the artist comments overlaid as markers (hover to read). Graceful fallback when no waveform/length is stored.
